hero.tagline: I build AI-driven, production-grade software with real-world impact.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a full-stack web developer and final-year Computer Science student (BSc Hons) based in Valencia, Spain, specialising in AI-driven applications, backend engineering and cloud infrastructure.
about.p2: I've shipped production-grade software across healthcare tech and industrial digitalisation, with a focus on clean architecture, model integration and measurable real-world impact.

points: Built deep learning pipelines with PyTorch and MONAI (NVIDIA Clara) for medical imaging segmentation.
Designed and implemented a FastAPI backend serving AI model inference in a clinical context.
Collaborated directly with clinical specialists to validate models against real diagnostic needs.

fitforge.tagline: Full-stack fitness platform (Final Degree Project, ~5 months)
fitforge.desc: A fitness SPA with a 14-table relational schema, 33 REST endpoints, JWT auth and role-based access control.
fitforge.details: FitForge is a complete fitness management platform built as my final degree project over five months. The Symfony 7 backend (PHP 8.2) exposes 33 documented REST endpoints over a normalised 14-table MySQL schema, secured with JWT authentication and role-based access control. The Angular frontend uses lazy-loaded feature modules for fast initial paint, and the whole stack is containerised with Docker for reproducible deployments.

llm.tagline: Geospatial analysis tool for Spanish land parcels (~3 months)
llm.desc: Multi-threaded Python tool achieving 90%+ faster bulk cadastral fetches, rendered to a single portable HTML map.
llm.details: Legacy Land Mapper ingests Spanish cadastral parcel data, processes it with Pandas and renders interactive GeoJSON layers with Leaflet.js. A 20-worker multi-threaded fetcher cut bulk retrieval time by more than 90%. The entire output compiles into one portable, dependency-free HTML file that runs anywhere, designed for non-technical users managing inherited land.
